prompt: Edit image 1: Transform the software interface to adopt the modern, futuristic dark theme and glowing neon pink/blue accent colors seen in image 2, applying the sleek aesthetic to the existing layout and components.
prompt_refined: Transform the software interface displayed in image 1. Incorporate the sleek aesthetic and prominent glowing neon pink and blue/cyan accent colors, drawing heavily from the visual style and luminescence observed in the reference image 2.
